author: François Chalifour
subject: feat(search): Promisify `client.search()` (algolia/algoliasearch-helper-js#571)
body:
* feat: Use Promise for search
* chore: test getClient is returning the same client
* chore: remove only
* chore: Upgrade sinon
* feat: Log the error on search
* test: Update tests with promise version of `search()`
* style: Indent promise methods
* feat: Catch error when `UnhandledPromiseRejectionWarning` might happen
* feat: Use promisified version of `client.search()` in `searchOnce()`
* test: Update tests with new `searchOnce()`
* test: Remove test for `searchOnce()` with callbacks
* chore: Add comment on internal state in `_search()`
* test: Add queryID test for `_dispatchAlgoliaError()`
* test: Revert deletion of test for `searchOnce()` with callbacks
This reverts commit bf87ddfa6a95cd0634c584b0a1e4c75f013c1257.
* test: Update `searchOnce()` with callback test
